title: User-created suggestion text in document templates
excerpt: When creating a template, I want to be able to create suggestion text that disappears when someone clicks on it and appears in a lighter color. When I use a pre-built template, suggestion text appears, but I can’t find a…

posts.author: dkeshet (Dan Keshet)
posts.cookedHtml: When creating a template, I want to be able to create suggestion text that disappears when someone clicks on it and appears in a lighter color. When I use a pre-built template, suggestion text appears, but I can’t find a way to create my own.
